zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor of England Queen of Castile於1160年10月13日出生在法國諾門迪奧內多福洛特時，她的父親Henry II King of England27歲，母親Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre37歲。她於1180年9月與Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1214年10月31日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯享年54歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor of England Queen of Castile于1160年10月13日出生在法国諾門迪奧內多福洛特时，她的父亲Henry II King of England27岁，母亲Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre37岁。她于1180年9月与Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1214年10月31日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯享年54岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: England
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

variants.name: English
meanings: English, Scottish, and Welsh: ethnic name from Middle English English, Inglish, Inglis ‘English’ (Old English Englisc), sometimes alternating with Anglo-Norman French Engleis, Engles, Anglais, Angles (Old French Englois). Compare Inglis and England . Among the aristocracy and upper gentry it marked out a man of English ancestry from one of Norman or continental origin. In counties bordering England with Scotland and Wales the name distinguished an Englishman from a Scot or a native Welshman on both sides of the border. The name may also have been acquired by English merchants who traded abroad or who lived and worked in a ‘French’ borough in England (one exclusively administered by Normans).
Irish: in Ireland, this name was used to denote an Englishman, often being adopted for Irish Aingléis ‘Englishman’ or through mistranslation for Mac an Ghallóglaigh, see Gallogly and Golightly .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor of England Queen of Castile was born on 13 October 1160, in Domfront, Orne, Normandy, France, her father, Henry II King of England, was 27 and her mother, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, was 37. She married Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla in September 1180, in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 31 October 1214, in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 54, and was buried in Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor of England Queen of Castile est née le 13 octobre 1160, à Domfront, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Henry II King of England, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla en septembre 1180, à Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 octobre 1214, à Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor of England Queen of Castile am 13. Oktober 1160 in Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry II King of England 27 und ihre Mutter Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre 37. Sie hat im September 1180 in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Oktober 1214 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor of England Queen of Castile è nata il il 13 ottobre 1160 nel Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Henry II King of England, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla nel settembre 1180, nel Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 31 ottobre 1214, nel Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor of England Queen of Castileが1160年10月13日にフランスノーマンディオルンドムフロントで生まれた時，父Henry II King of Englandは27歳，母Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterreは37歳であった。1180年9月にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスでRey Alfonso VIII de Castillaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1214年10月31日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスで54歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスブルゴスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor of England Queen of Castile(이)가 1160년 10월 13일 프랑스 노먼디 른 돔프론트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry II King of England(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1180년 9월 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스에서 Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 10월 31일 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 버고스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor of England Queen of Castile nasceu em 13 de outubro de 1160, em Domfront, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Henry II King of England, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla em setembro de 1180, em Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1214, em Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor of England Queen of Castile родилась 13 октября 1160 г. в местности домфронт, орн, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Henry II King of England было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla сентябрь 1180 г. в местности бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 31 октября 1214 г. в местности бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности бургос, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor of England Queen of Castile nació el 13 de octubre de 1160, en Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Henry II King of England, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla en septiembre de 1180, en Burgos, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1214, en Burgos, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, España.
